docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50) SERVED FEB-11-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAMER, PATRICK
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT HAMER, PATRICK MAILED TO RESPONDENT SCHNEIDER, JAMES

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JAMES SCHNEIDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK HAMER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. ORDER OF EXAMINATION WAS CONDUCTED AND COMPLETED IN COURT. COURT GRANTS JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR A PAYMENT PLAN. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $145.83 FOR 11 MONTHS. DUE TO MATHEMATICAL ERROR THE FINAL PAYMENT DUE ON THE 12TH MONTH SHALL BE $145.87 INSTEAD OF $45.87 AS STATED IN COURT FOR TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,750.00. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE ELECTRONICALLY STARTING SEPTEMBER 15, 2022, AND ON 15TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. IF AT ANY TIME JUDGMENT DEBTOR DEFAULTS ON THE PAYMENT PLAN, JUDGMENT CREDITOR CAN SUBMIT A DECLARATION OF DEFAULT WITH THE COURT (SC-223) TO CANCEL OR VOID THE PAYMENT PLAN. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2022 - CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2022 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525. RESPONDENT JAMES SCHNEIDER PRESENT IN PERSON. NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT PATRICK HAMER. THE APPELLANT CALLED IN AND REPRESENTED THAT HE IS SICK. RESPONDENT WAS NOTIFIED IN PERSON OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE TO 6/23/22 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 525. THE COURT WILL CALL THE APPELLANT OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. ANY FURTHER CONTINUANCE WILL BE BY STIPULATION OR EX PARTE APPLICATION. (206)
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2022 DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT APPEARED. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL; CLERK: C. BALANGA; NOT REPORTED (D608)
UPDATE MADE TO THE COURT RE: DEFENDANT'S CURRENT MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, JAMES
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-08-2022 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) AS TO DEFENDANT HAMER, PATRICK
ORDER OEX CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2022 - TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT, NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION - DISCHARGED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY SCHNEIDER, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT HAMER, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JAMES SCHEIDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK HAMER IS PRESENT. CASE HEARD WITH SC-500 (RENTAL DEBT) 22-865300 PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHNEIDER, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMER, PATRICK $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, THE NOTICE TO PAYMENT OR QUIT DOES NOT RELIEVE THE DEFENDANT'S RESPONSIBILITY TO PAY RENT UNTIL HE VACATES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2022 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2022 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON JUN-23-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 608, JUDGE GERARDO SANDOVAL. (206)
ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2022 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 608
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMER, PATRICK HEARING SET FOR AUG-18-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2022 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-01-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR JAMES SCHEIDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR PATRICK HAMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUEST TO SPEAK TO A JUDGE IN REGARDS TO MAKING A PAYMENT PLAN. DEFENDANT STATED TO THE COURT HE FELT THREATENED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE; M. TONG; CLERK; A. DATT. (NOT REPORTED) (506).
